notes: All 7 sites returned HTTP 403 from the WebFetch tool. SSL/TLS handshakes succeeded on all 7 domains (OpenSSL connected and retrieved valid certs expiring 2026-05-17), which strongly indicates the sites are serving traffic but the automated WebFetch crawler is being blocked by Cloudflare or Vercel WAF bot-protection — not actual downtime. Per monitoring rules, 403 is classified as non-2xx (down). Manual verification recommended before treating as a real outage. NOTE: SSL certs renewed since yesterday (now 2026-05-17, up from 2026-05-16).
